title: dryopteris intermedia subsp. maderensis
intro: Dryopteris intermedia subsp. maderensis is a fern species, belonging to the Dryopteris genus, which is commonly known as the intermediate wood fern. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris intermedia subsp. maderensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
